name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Met at university during our CSE first year in Dhaka. We've been inseparable since then. She now works as a UX designer at a local tech company and inspires me daily.

name: Mahmudul Hasan
bio: My first team lead in a Dhaka-based software company. He believed in me before I believed in myself. Now he's a senior engineering manager. We try to meet for tea every couple of weeks.

name: Aisha Rahman
bio: Travel buddy and photography enthusiast. We met during a trip to Cox's Bazar and have been planning trips to Sylhet and Bandarban ever since.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: University roommate turned business partner. We started a small freelance design agency in Dhaka. Now he runs his own studio and we exchange ideas regularly.

name: Farhana Akter
bio: Former colleague and mentor from an NGO in Bangladesh. We worked together for years on community health projects. She now leads public health initiatives across different districts.

name: Rafiul Karim
bio: Met at a tech and design meetup in Dhaka. He introduced me to minimal design concepts that completely changed my perspective on UI/UX.

name: Shakib Hossain
bio: Adventure partner from a long bike trip across different districts of Bangladesh. We bonded over roadside tea stalls and scenic village roads.

name: Sabina Yasmin
bio: Journalism department friend who is now working in media. She creates impactful documentaries on climate change and social issues in Bangladesh.

name: Rakib Chowdhury
bio: Startup mentor I met at a Dhaka incubator program. He guided me through my first business idea and helped me understand the local startup ecosystem.

name: Mim Akter
bio: Creative friend I met at a local cultural event. She loves art, poetry, and deep conversations. Our weekly chats are always meaningful and refreshing.
